name: 17 — SMS Phone Farm Router (Load Balance Across Real SIM Cards)

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ {"model": "claude-haiku-4-5-20251001", "max_tokens": 150, "messages": [{"role": "user", "content": "Rate this SMS message for spam risk (1-10, 10=highest risk) and suggest one improvement if score > 5. Message: '" + $('Send SMS Webhook').item.json.message + "' Response: JSON only {score: N, suggestion: string|null}"}]} }}

meta.description: Routes SMS through real Android phones with SIM cards. Selects best phone by area code match, then round-robin. Also runs Claude spam risk check in parallel.
meta.setup: Install android-sms-gateway APK on Android phones. Each phone registers to TextBee. Multiple phones = higher volume capacity.
